all_steps.note: Lower pred_similarity means the model forecasts DIFFERENT outcomes for the two members of the pair. Expected: endpoint gives high similarity (same current Vec3 → same forecast), trajectory gives lower similarity (different history → different forecast).

classification.method: median split on per-trajectory minimum Vec3 component

endpoint_matched_steps.note: Lower pred_similarity means the model forecasts DIFFERENT outcomes for the two members of the pair. Expected: endpoint gives high similarity (same current Vec3 → same forecast), trajectory gives lower similarity (different history → different forecast).
